review_title: All in one tool for remote support tool
description: I have been using getscreen for more than 2 years and here is my detailed review. I will use this to login to remote cloud devices there by blocking RDP access over internet and securing my environment. Video and audio works well if you have a decent intenet connectivity for remote computers. I also monitor my cloud devices and getscreen notifies me when my server goes offline. I also use this to support my parents computer if they need any support. Voice funicationality and messaging funcionality is an added advantage. File transfer works abosulutely fine there by providing secure way of sharing files. I use quick support if i need to support my other family and friends as and when needed. Overall a great tool which can be used to support adhoc devices and also permanent devices.
author: Diwakar D.
pros: Allows you to add permanent computers Voice call Wakup on LAN File transfer Reboot Device monitoring alert Great price for personal and commercial usage.
cons: They have removed this product from Appsumo which means we cannot upgrade this to diff level anymore.

review_title: Getscreen.me Top-class Remote Desktop Support Tool, with easy Screen Sharing Solution.
description: Robust tool with all the features we use and run them in web browser on any kind of device which makes this tool a stunner. Overall the speed is faster than any remote support software I have used so far.
author: Mohammed A.
pros: We use it mainly for remote customers support, with quick support option which is easy to do especially when user have installed their browser add-on. The simplicity of this tool is great easy to use install and with a very clean and easy to navigate UI which allows users easy to complete any support session without much support, and I like I can create a quick link to assist a customer remotely easily. I like the Telegram integration which issues fast support the request takes only 10 secs and ready to join from the Telegram app. I like the embedded option which helps me to place the join module in my website. Easy to share screen with my customers during support sessions. The ability to just send a link and connect remotely to the computer without any installation is great.
cons: It's a bit expensive for the small teams, there is need to cut the price which would be a fair option to the small teams. Overall I can't complain anything else is working excellenty.

review_title: Don't Let the Price Fool You, Keep Shopping
description: 1: The Windows software that gets installed on the remote computer you are supporting often stays active after the support session is terminated. This includes a dialog box that returns every time its closed. My users are annoyed by this and are not able to remove this without phone support (establishing a remote session brings it back). 2: Apple support? It works but it requires the remote user you are supporting to configure two parameters (Screen Recording and Accessibility) before their screen will display properly. Most of the people I support are not able to handle these operations. They are looking for help and not an education on how to tweak settings on their Mac. 3: Android support? Works but requires the end user to gut any and all security in place on the mobile device in order for the Getscreen software to run. Not cool and also beyond the tech skills of most of the people I work with. 4: The windows version of Getscreen requires the end-user to download and run a .exe file. Many content filtering firewalls and anti-virus software will stop Getscreen in its tracks and disallow the use of it. I have not used the product that long, so I expect this may be the short list. Also note, I have a paid subscription for this product.
author: Don S.
pros: Ease of use, product has a nice console and it is easy to create a quick support session and send it to the end user via email.
cons: This product has multiple issues, none of which the company is able to support. I submitted multiple trouble tickets and there was no attempt for any meaningful resolution by Getscreen
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: An affordable option to more expensive programs if bought on lifetime or long plans
description: We support all our customers with computer problems and also for training and explanations of problems, this saves a massive amount of travel time and keeps our carbon foot print low. We can also respond a lot quicker than waiting for an engineer to be available to attend. We can also do work after hours upgrading or checking backups that would be difficult in person.
author: Michael R.
pros: The main features I need are easy to deploy quick support that doesn't need a lot of explaining as some customers are not very I.T literate and also unattended to drop in and out of machines whenever required. Getscreen can do both of these easily, although not as elegantly as other tools we have used but it does the job. There is an option for Video and voice chat which looks interesting but have not tried this feature yet as we use a different tool for this but we are going to give it a test drive.
cons: It doesn't reconnect on a reboot and does get stuck a few times and needs a refresh which is a bit annoying when busy I would also like it to log sessions but it doesn't do it as well as Zoho. It can be a bit slow some days and some grief when supporting Apple macs
